title: stellaria graminea var. palustris
intro: Stellaria graminea var. palustris, also known as marsh chickweed, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Marsh chickweed is said to have several health benefits, including soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat wounds, eczema, and other skin conditions.
